description: Safari bookmarks parser reads Bookmarks.plist and emits BrowserEvent per URL bookmark
steps: Use plist crate to read file, walk recursively
Leaf nodes have WebBookmarkType == 'WebBookmarkTypeLeaf', URLString key for URL, URIDictionary.title for title
Folder nodes have WebBookmarkType == 'WebBookmarkTypeList', Children array
Use current time (or 0) as timestamp since plist bookmarks lack timestamps
Test: parse_safari_bookmarks_finds_leaf_urls — plist with 1 leaf URL emits 1 event
Test: parse_safari_bookmarks_excludes_folders — folder-type nodes not emitted
Test: nested_safari_bookmarks_all_found — 2 URLs in nested folders both found
